promoted_facts.fact: ADQ's new COO Arthur D'Elia joined March 17, 2025, previously served as Domino's EVP International (May 2022-Oct 2024)
Deferred compensation plan: $27.2M in rabbi trust mutual funds; no company contributions 2022-2024
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — from financial notes depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Franchise incentive programs: $6.1M deferred incentives for franchisee remodels/tech/new builds, amortized 3-7 years
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — from financial notes depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Maryland fee deferral: MD Securities Commissioner required initial fees deferred until outlet opens
North Dakota termination fee entirely deleted by state addendum
Washington noncompete void for employees earning <$100K/yr annualized and independent contractors <$250K/yr
Washington no-poach: franchisor cannot restrict franchisee from soliciting/hiring employees of other franchisees or franchisor
Confidentiality clauses restrict some former franchisees from speaking about their experience
IDQ effective tax rate 24.21% (2024), consistent across 2022-2024
Independent franchisee organizations: DQOA (Chanhassen, MN), DQOC (Chanhassen, MN), Texas DQ Operators' Council (Bedford, TX)
